stories.title: Concierge API smoke test
stories.evidence: brief→3건+greeting+whyItMatters+spokenScript, ask→answer+sources5건+followUps3개, save+today→2건 조회, remind→before_leave preset 저장, handoff→source:ask 반환

stories.title: Desk 화면 검증
stories.evidence: desk/page.tsx에 whyItMatters, recommendedAction, appDeepLink 렌더링 확인

stories.title: Action Queue 검증
stories.evidence: actions/page.tsx에 actionType 구분 (remind/save), pending/completed 표시, 완료 처리 로직 존재

stories.title: Ask 흐름 검증
stories.evidence: search/page.tsx가 /api/concierge/ask 호출, followUpQuestions 렌더링, 기사 목록 표시

stories.title: 빌드 통과
stories.evidence: npx next build 성공, TypeScript 0 errors, 모든 concierge API 라우트 등록 확인
